#  What changes when companies upgrade to paid accounts? 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Background 
If you are a company in the construction industry, you can create a free Procore account and join the **Procore Construction Network**. Through your free account, you can view and access your Procore projects and bids, manage your team and business profile, and more. To access a full suite of project management tools, you can purchase a Procore subscription and transition to a paid account.
##  Answer 
When you upgrade to a paid Procore company account, certain aspects of your experience change as new tools become available.
#### User Interface
**Paid Procore Accounts**
Users in paid Procore accounts have a navigation menu across the top of their screens, where tool and project selection menus are found. A company logo is usually visible on the left side of the navigation menu.
![Clipboard E9904ab306f5eda17e72dbc6b35db7324](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1a8884e198fd52c74e2eee23f9ad9266/8a1074a0b7f34d6f26514e597038fbf4/clipboard_e9904ab306f5eda17e72dbc6b35db7324.png?fm=webp)
**Free Procore Accounts**
Users with free Procore accounts have a navigation menu that runs from top to bottom along the left side of the screen. A Procore logo is visible at the top of this navigation menu.
![Clipboard E02c38747b56a7edeb39c769215b82d](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0be6769912dd565466b9c133a91c545d/f5bae369150492b9403999277d380537/clipboard_e02c38747b56a7edeb39c72b69215b82d.png?fm=webp)
#### User Management
Instead of using the 'Teams' tool, you will use the Company level Directory tool to manage your employees and collaborators. Because not all of your users and collaborators will work on every project, you will also have a Project Directory for each of your projects. Users and companies added to a Project level Directory are automatically added to the Company level Directory for a single source of truth for all your users.
**Paid Procore Accounts**
![Clipboard E9ba239372fe5000fec091469d505a7da](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/dfa20c3b7b245150daf13f08d2115b00/f035331fd27a4153cf06ff63fa55a4c0/clipboard_e9ba239372fe5000fec091469d505a7da.png?fm=webp)
**Free Procore Accounts**
![Clipboard Eae30827aa4a68efbf8f2f363971f1c81](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b75a394163867f66bedb89b5d18d8d27/b2fb86cab3a0721062f06303498b8605/clipboard_eae30827aa4a68efbf8f2f363971f1c81.png?fm=webp)
#####  Note
Users added as a member of your company may need to have the same email domain to be added.
![Clipboard E7549b52f174cb04bdce7afc74f2665](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c1a7edcb26dab7ce885a4b0e875a8808/9c9ad588a00853c6e767158c1dc8eb5e/clipboard_e7549b52b2f174cb04bdce7afc74f2665.png?fm=webp&h=290)
##### Learn More about the Company Directory
  * [Company Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/)
  * [Company Directory Training Videos](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/videos)


##### Learn More about the Project Directory
  * [Project Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-project/)
  * [Project Directory Training Videos](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-project/videos)


#### Add Collaborators
With your upgraded account, you can invite collaborators to your projects. Build out your broader team by creating companies and adding collaborators to your Directory.
##### Add Collaborators to the Company Directory
  * [Add a Company to the Company Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/add-a-company-to-the-company-directory)
  * [Add a User Account to the Company Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/add-a-user-account-to-the-company-directory)


##### Add Collaborators to the Project Directory
  * [Add a Company to the Project Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/set-up-a-project-directory/create-companies)
  * [Add a User Account to the Project Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-project/tutorials/add-user-account-to-project-directory)


#### Permissions
Instead of assigning one of three permissions to a user, you will now use the Company level Permissions tool to create permissions templates that give access to tools and actions for the tools your company has access to.
Existing user permissions are carried over from your free account. You can [update those permissions templates](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/edit-a-company-permissions-template) or [create new ones](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/create-a-company-permissions-template).
You can manage user permissions in the [Permissions tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/), or when [editing the user in the company's Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/assign-a-project-permissions-template-to-a-user-in-the-company-directory).
**Paid Procore Accounts**
![Clipboard E62a4731a290aa1224a7aa4b9a5973faf](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0c75efd4a250d2080b1eac673d3a93d6/2b6b494254c401f518ece017ed5f1954/clipboard_e62a4731a290aa1224a7aa4b9a5973faf.png?fm=webp)
**Free Procore Accounts**
![Clipboard Ecfa771030709ae6aecf57b99759946c6](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/84f011486ed04beb7bedc40a3b80bac5/2ad1c3a7a0c70b578e676e27b264db40/clipboard_ecfa771030709ae6aecf57b99759946c6.png?fm=webp)
##### Learn More about Permissions
  * [Assign a Project Permissions Template to a User in the Company Directory](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/directory-company/tutorials/assign-a-project-permissions-template-to-a-user-in-the-company-directory)
  * [Company Permissions Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/)


#### Procore Construction Network Profile Information and Visibility
You can manage your business page information and visibility on the Procore Construction Network in the [Company Information](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/manage-company-information) section of your [Company's Admin tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/).
**Paid Procore Accounts**
![Clipboard E1c6061320f9cd10ff55bc2140725c394](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fe6e2fa6989e73c8800a394c260a9239/f80a27d578796fc4a5acfeb5265044cf/clipboard_e1c6061320f9cd10ff55bc2140725c394.png?fm=webp)
**Free Procore Accounts**
![Clipboard E63be8b5f2978423d63ee7ec40b7bc2e2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0699cc59513c1219fc65b98b9bab19eb/05049ea5d0280e8fd430524ab49ac0b4/clipboard_e63be8b5f2978423d63ee7ec40b7bc2e2.png?fm=webp)
#### Invitations to Bid
If you purchased Procore's Estimating tool, you can continue to use the Bid Board tool, located in your new toolbar.
**Paid Procore Accounts**
![Clipboard E6098bea5b8be660537349ede87](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/6afc96ed8c18e5eac24cad0f8b164960/8611bf7eb2901e9131d292ae6ec42358/clipboard_e6092b82bbea2b5b8be660537349ede87.png?fm=webp)
**Free Procore Accounts**
![Clipboard E445ad6e4f7bcf4e6aea2c4a4ab8292d7](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/62b3a69b24d665b4f670f2eaa983a62a/9e0d7109ee83074ad8abe73c751fb51f/clipboard_e445ad6e4f7bcf4e6aea2c4a4ab8292d7.png?fm=webp)
If you did NOT purchase Procore's Estimating tool, you will access bids through the Planroom tool of the company that invited you to bid.
**Paid Procore Accounts**
![clipboard_ec347bd4d0a73c162b0a376584df62174.png](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ca07372bb717f329c275544e99c6301a/3bf951a728ddc1288e9458d0aa48d05c/clipboard_ec347bd4d0a73c162b0a376584df62174.png?fm=webp)
**Free Procore Accounts**
![Clipboard Eb926c0267754b01e961255c72081acd9](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8fa5406f3ebcf1e385db015220a13689/794a7daf1669ad6f7fabf6b1ea5e9451/clipboard_eb926c0267754b01e961255c72081acd9.png?fm=webp)
##### Learn More about the Bid Board tool
  * [Company Bid Board Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/bid-board-company/)
  * [Bid Board Training Videos](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/bid-board-company/videos)


##### Learn more about the Planroom Tool
  * [Planroom Training Videos](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/planroom-company/videos)


##### Learn more about the Team tool
  * [Manage your Team tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials#:~:text=Manage%20Your%20Team%20Tool)

title: What changes when companies upgrade to paid accounts?
description: A summary of what changes when companies upgrade from free to paid Procore accounts.
